svg.title: Loci architecture diagram
svg.desc: Full system architecture of Loci — persistent memory infrastructure for AI agents, showing agent input, memory layers, storage, and Cloudflare infrastructure.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about working memory in Loci')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about episodic memory in Loci')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about semantic memory in Loci')
sendPrompt('How does Loci inject memory into the LLM call?')
sendPrompt('What does Loci log after each agent run?')
g.text: Action taken, outcome, errors — logged to D1

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Loci distill episodes into learnings?')
g.text: Extracts rules from episodes — Cloudflare Queue

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Loci dashboard show?')
g.text: Cloudflare Pages — episodes, learnings, retrieval hits
